titleStmt.title: Letter from the Fellow and Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland to Richard Lane Joynt, 4 March 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Fellow and Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Typescript letter stating that 'thanks of the College are due and are hereby tendered to Mr. Richard Lane Joynt (Richard Lane Joynt, Esq., F.R.C.S.I. d.1928), for his generous gift of two early clinical thermometers, and more especially for the thermometer used by the late Dr. A W Foot who was for many years a Fellow of this College'

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: Fellow and Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland, Dublin
The Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland, Dublin

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
RCPI/2/3/2/13/198 4th MARCH 16.
R.Lane Joynt,Esq.,F.R.C.S.I.,
Dublin. Dear Sir, I am requested by the President and Fellows of the
Royal College of Physicians of Ireland to forward you a copy
of the following resolution which was passed at a meeting of
the College held yesterday the 3rd inst., Resolved :that the thanks of the College are due and are
hereby tendered to Mr.R.Lane Joynt,F.R.C.S.I., for his
generous gift of two early clinical thermometers, and more
especially for the thermometer used by the late Dr.A.W.Foot
who was for many years a Fellow of this College. I am, Dear SIr,
Yours faithfully,
Fellow & Registrar.
